title: alsine tenuifolia subsp. confertiflora
intro: Alsine tenuifolia subsp. confertiflora, also known as moss campion or alpine campion, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the carnation family, Caryophyllaceae. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Alsine tenuifolia subsp. confertiflora include reducing inflammation, treating wounds, and soothing digestive issues. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
